name: I Won't Love Anyone Anymore
overview: Miyuki works in a bank with Sayuri and Takuya. Sayuri and Takuya plot to get the money each of them needs. Miyuki is violently hurt by their scheme and her relationship with her fiance is affected. When Miyuki discovers the people responsible for all that has happened to her, she plans her revenge.

trailers.title: もう誰も愛さない　第11話　偽りの結婚　初回　1991年6月20日
